query: Set up git-delta so I can see nice diffs.
expected_behavior: Uses `nix-ensure -p git-delta delta` or `nix shell nixpkgs#git-delta -c delta` so the binary `delta` is invoked (package name differs from binary name).
baseline_without_skill: Tries `nix shell nixpkgs#delta` or `nix run nixpkgs#delta`, which fails because the package is `git-delta`.
